creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Demetris Procopiou from comment #0)
> - update to version 1.0.17
> - update pkg-plist
> - patch generation

Is there a reason why you regenerated patches?

Unless the patch actually changes, or is in the old format, which is not the case here, it needs to be regenerated, but maybe I'm missing something.

Thanks.
